creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks very much for working on this, that entry is added by me.

I've tried to update this patch to push one step toward according to the https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/

Here is my WIP: https://github.com/lwhsu/freebsd-ports-dosbox-x

However there seems still some work needed to make it build in poudriere:
https://gist.github.com/e1a8fbd89ed858910cad659648bd0671

Can you help check this?
